name: operation-gladio
description: Paul L. Williams's Operation Gladio — geopolitical conspiracy investigation into the secret alliance between the Vatican, the CIA, and the Mafia, covering WWII stay-behind networks, drug trafficking, P2 lodge, the Vatican Bank scandal, and the assassination attempt on John Paul II
useCase: Understand the alleged secret networks behind Cold War history, the Vatican-CIA-Mafia connection, the strategy of tension, and the importance of intelligence oversight
knownRisks: The book makes extremely controversial and unverified allegations — treat all claims as the author's interpretation, not established fact
Many documents remain classified — the full story may never be known
The book relies heavily on secondary sources and conspiracy researchers, not primary documents
Some mainstream historians dispute Williams's interpretation of events like the Bologna bombing and JP2 assassination attempt
